reviews.comment:
Ni media estrella les daría. Se pusieron la gorra los playeros los dueños los encargados etc, hice fila de más de una cuadra con mi hijo y no me quisieron cargar porque no tenía el casco, gracias por hacerme perder mi valioso tiempo. No vayan no lo recomiendo. Por último, los playeros hacen sociales, se sacan bien las ganas de charlar y después te atienden.

(Translated by Google)
I wouldn't even give them half a star. The attendants, owners, managers, etc., all wore caps. I waited in line for over a block with my son, and they wouldn't let me in because I didn't have a helmet. Thanks for wasting my valuable time. Don't go; I don't recommend it. Finally, the attendants are very social; they really enjoy chatting before serving you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoMjg2ZDZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar. Buena atención y servicio. Es solo estación de nafta, no de GNC. Cuenta con servicio de calibración de neumáticos. Y también un minimercado. Lo recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place. Great service and attention. It's a gasoline station only, not a CNG station. They offer tire calibration services and also have a convenience store. I recommend it.
